İsmail Aydemir Ph.D. Thesis Defense Announcement

The study titled “The Impact of Demarketing Strategies on Subscription Retention Behavior on OTT Platforms in Turkey”, prepared as a doctoral dissertation within the scope of the PhD Program in Business Administration, will be presented by İsmail Aydemir under the supervision of Prof. Dr. Nimet Uray. The thesis defense will take place on February 19, 2026, at 13:30, in Room H-203.
